title: fix(deps): update module github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/v2 to v2.0.3
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/v2](https://togithub.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man) | require | patch | `v2.0.2` -> `v2.0.3` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>cpuguy83/go-md2man (github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/v2)</summary>

### [`v2.0.3`](https://togithub.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/releases/tag/v2.0.3)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/compare/v2.0.2...v2.0.3)

Rendering bug fixes:

-   [`e5bd727`](https://togithub.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/commit/e5bd7279ca22057177f0e33f939bb6cf26e0ffc0) - Escape hyphens in links to avoid word wrap ([@​r10r](https://togithub.com/r10r))
-   [`66e0792`](https://togithub.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/commit/66e0792f4bf72fede875e62279870032025ba094) - Do not render links twice ([@​r10r](https://togithub.com/r10r))
-   [`65a740a`](https://togithub.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/commit/65a740a5b8948d921db6223577afbe055e892113)  - Do not typeset table headings in monospaced font ([@​kolyshkin](https://togithub.com/kolyshkin))
-   [`43fb747`](https://togithub.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/commit/43fb74760164368fd0c74c84e4f55ec3ab5d752e)  - Use .EX/.EE for code examples ([@​kolyshkin](https://togithub.com/kolyshkin))
-   [`d85280d`](https://togithub.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/commit/d85280db9b54b5747fe8cf9380a9f278e1a352d3) - Silence warnings caused by `\fC` which is non-portable. ([@​debarshiray](https://togithub.com/debarshiray))

CLI improvements:

-   [`e2293e7`](https://togithub.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/commit/e2293e7f480f1ba0e6632cbd4a307d32ff3007bd) - Don't warn on top-level comments ([@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac))

Other changes include code formatting and doc imporvements.

Thanks to all who helped make this release happen.

</details>
